meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Stuck Apps
content.seo_description: Learn how to optimize your client workflow and overcome being stuck with basic apps. An advanced-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for developers.
content.answer_block: Break the cycle of basic app stagnation by implementing an automated, component-driven client workflow. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative logic refinement, you transform manual build processes into high-velocity, professional systems that deliver superior client value and drastically reduce your development time.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: staring at a half-finished CRUD app, feeling the weight of scope creep and the creeping dread of a deadline that feels like a closing trap. You are an expert, yet you find yourself trapped in the purgatory of 'basic' builds, manually patching bugs while your client asks for 'just one more feature.' The stagnation isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of a rigorous, automated architecture.

It is time to evolve your pipeline. By shifting from manual coding to an orchestration-first workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code, you don't just build faster—you build with the authority of a senior engineer. This is how you reclaim your time, justify premium rates, and turn every freelance project into a scalable masterpiece that leaves competitors in the dust.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the robust foundation of your application to prevent technical debt from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular, production-ready project structure using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include strict TypeScript configurations and a clean service-layer architecture.

steps.title: Database Schema Automation
steps.description: Automate the creation of relational schemas to ensure data integrity without manual migration headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including user roles, subscription tiers, and audit logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push'

steps.title: Component Library Injection
steps.description: Inject high-fidelity UI components that are fully responsive and accessible, saving hours of CSS tweaking.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a reusable button, input, and modal component library using Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS.

steps.title: Business Logic Orchestration
steps.description: Use Claude to write complex server-side logic while maintaining a clean separation of concerns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server-side function for payment processing using Stripe, including error handling and transaction logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'implement stripe webhook handler in lib/stripe.ts'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Ensure code reliability by generating E2E tests for your core user flows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright tests for the user authentication flow, covering sign-up, login, and protected route access.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'prompt library' for your specific stack to ensure consistent output quality across different client projects.
Use git-hooks to trigger your Claude Code linting tasks before every commit to catch issues early.
Treat your client's requirements document as a system prompt; feed it into Claude Code as a context file for zero-hallucination development.
Implement a 'dry-run' phase in your workflow where Claude Code explains its proposed changes before applying them to your production branch.
Use environment-specific configuration files managed by Antigravity to swap between development and production contexts seamlessly.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder structure, then integrate the Antigravity scaffolding tool to standardize your future client deliverables.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop building 'basic' apps and start engineering profitable, high-end SaaS products. The bottleneck wasn't your skill—it was your workflow. Stop manual coding and start orchestrating your success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
